basis: Only ROM-derived raw_hex from existing extraction JSON is analyzed.
Candidate fields are promoted only when range/distribution or personal-record cross-reference supports them.

evidence: first u16 in each non-zero 6-byte evolution entry is reported only as a distribution.
second u16 in each non-zero 6-byte evolution entry is reported only as a distribution.
third u16 in each non-zero 6-byte evolution entry is compared with personal record count/range.
triplet_word_2.label: target_species_candidate

evidence: byte offset 10 is a compact grouping code across 34-byte item records.
byte_10.label: pocket_candidate

evidence: byte offset 11 is constrained to a small code range across 34-byte item records.
byte_11.label: battle_usage_candidate

evidence: byte offset 2 is sparse and zero-heavy; keep as a code candidate only.
byte_2.label: hold_effect_code_candidate

evidence: u16le offset 0 has bounded non-negative values across 34-byte item records.
u16le_0.label: price_candidate

evidence: byte offset 2 is fully constrained to 0..2 across 16-byte move records.
byte_2.label: category_candidate

evidence: byte offset 3 is compact and includes zero plus non-zero magnitudes.
byte_3.label: power_candidate

evidence: byte offset 4 is fully constrained to 0..17 across 16-byte move records.
byte_4.label: type_id_candidate

evidence: byte offset 5 is fully constrained to 0..100 across 16-byte move records.
byte_5.label: accuracy_candidate

evidence: byte offset 6 is a compact mostly non-zero value across 16-byte move records.
byte_6.label: pp_candidate

evidence: u16le offset 0 is compact and non-constant across 16-byte move records.
u16le_0.label: effect_code_candidate

notes: This refinement uses only existing ROM extraction JSON with preserved raw bytes.
Existing extractor candidate fields are not treated as confirmed unless the observed bytes support them.
Evolution target species candidates are cross-referenced only against personal record count/range.
The first two u16 words in evolution triplets are intentionally reported as distributions only.

rejections.label: byte_14_all_zero
rejections.reason: all observed values are zero, so this byte is treated as padding/unused rather than a semantic field
